scripts.cap:sync: npm run prepare:web && npx --cache .\npm-cache cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run prepare:web && npx --cache .\npm-cache cap sync android && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr'; $env:ANDROID_HOME='C:\Users\dramirez\Documents\New project\android-sdk'; $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$env:ANDROID_HOME; $env:JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS='-Djdk.nio.zipfs.disableMemoryMapping=true -Dsun.zip.disableMemoryMapping=true'; $env:Path=\"$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;$env:ANDROID_HOME\platform-tools;$env:Path\"; Push-Location android; .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug --no-daemon --max-workers=1; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; exit $code"
